accurate.why: Accurately describes FEMA reporting requirement and joint FEMA/GAO review.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all stated facts match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as requiring FEMA and GAO to report on disability disaster assistance.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill does not amend existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 120-day deadline for the FEMA report.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both main requirements: the 120-day FEMA report and the broader review with recommendations.
